basis: Anchor 30 plan lists Atraxa as a WUBG Commander reference anchor.
Public Commander sources label Atraxa as a Commander deck commander.
cEDH/high-power context exists, but the default ManaLoom lane remains high-power casual unless requested.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Use representative packages and role signals only.
Do not force poison or cEDH lines into casual generation unless requested.

themes.name: proliferate_counters_superfriends
themes.notes: Atraxa converts counters and planeswalker loyalty into compounding end-step value.

themes.name: plus_one_counter_scaling
themes.notes: Counter doublers and scalable threats are strong casual/high-power anchors.

themes.name: poison_infect_optional
themes.notes: Poison is supported by Atraxa but socially and bracket sensitive.

themes.name: wubg_control_value
themes.notes: Premium interaction protects engines and stabilizes planeswalkers.

avoid_patterns.reason: Red is outside Atraxa color identity.

examples: too many planeswalkers without blockers or protection
avoid_patterns.reason: Planeswalkers need defense, ramp, and proliferate support.

examples: full infect package in low-power casual
avoid_patterns.reason: Poison can violate player intent and social contract expectations.
